content:
💡 pathway | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Building and deploying real-time data processing pipelines, analytics, and LLM applications using a unified Python API.
✨ Key Features: • Python ETL framework • Stream processing • Real-time analytics • LLM pipelines and RAG
📖 Summary: Pathway is a Python ETL framework designed for efficient stream processing, real-time analytics, and building LLM pipelines, including RAG. It offers a flexible Python API that works seamlessly with ML libraries, supporting both batch and streaming data for development and production. Its core is a scalable Rust engine that enables incremental computation, multithreading, multiprocessing, and distributed processing, with easy deployment options via Docker and Kubernetes.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
